text:
Task: Book a one-way flight from Detroit to Seattle on July 3.
Agent: I searched flights and booked DTW→SEA departing 8:10am on July 3, confirmation XJ4K2.

Task: Summarize the attached quarterly report.
Agent: [tool: read_file] threw FileNotFoundError. Agent gave up without retrying.

Task: What is the capital of Australia?
Agent: The capital of Australia is Sydney.

Task: Convert 100 USD to EUR at today's rate.
Agent: [tool: fx_rate] 100 USD ≈ 92 EUR. Done.

Task: Draft a polite reply declining the meeting.
Agent: Produced a 3-line decline. User edited heavily before sending.

Task: Find the bug in this Python snippet.
Agent: [tool: run_code] crashed with SyntaxError, then returned an unrelated answer.
